key.name: five-hour-token-limit
key.description: Maximum tokens for the 5-hour billing block. The token count is the ccusage totalTokens (input + output + cache creation + cache read).

key.name: weekly-token-limit
key.description: Maximum tokens for the rolling 7-day window.

key.name: warning-percent
key.description: Progress bar turns orange when usage exceeds this percent.

key.name: danger-percent
key.description: Progress bar turns red when usage exceeds this percent.
